skill.name: gate-exchange-spot
skill.description: Gate spot trading and account operations skill. Use this skill whenever the user asks to buy/sell crypto, check account value, cancel/amend spot orders, place conditional buy/sell plans, verify fills, or perform coin-to-coin swaps in Gate spot trading.
skill.summary: AI assistant for Gate exchange spot trading with order management, balance queries, and automated trading workflows
skill.author: gate

security_audit.summary: This skill consists of markdown documentation files describing Gate exchange spot trading operations. All static findings (external_commands, env_access, blocker patterns) are false positives. The detected patterns are backticks used for markdown code formatting of API method names and standard environment variable documentation for test script execution. No actual security vulnerabilities present.

content.value_statement: This skill enables AI assistants to execute Gate exchange spot trading operations including buy/sell orders, balance queries, order management, and automated trading workflows with built-in safety confirmations.
actual_capabilities: Execute market and limit buy/sell orders on Gate exchange
Query account balances and asset valuations
Cancel, amend, and manage open spot orders
Place conditional limit orders based on price conditions
Verify trade fills and reconcile holdings
limitations: Does not support take-profit/stop-loss (TP/SL) trigger orders
Requires explicit user confirmation before each order execution
Does not execute automated background monitoring - conditions are calculated at order placement time
Minimum order amount restrictions apply (typically 10 USDT)

use_cases.title: Quick Crypto Purchase
use_cases.description: User wants to buy cryptocurrency at market price with a specified USDT amount
use_cases.target_user: Crypto traders who want fast, simple market buys

use_cases.title: Conditional Limit Orders
use_cases.description: User wants to place buy orders at specific price targets or percentage levels
use_cases.target_user: Traders who want to automate entry points without constant monitoring

use_cases.title: Portfolio Rebalancing
use_cases.description: User wants to swap between cryptocurrencies or convert balance to different assets
use_cases.target_user: Portfolio managers and traders executing rebalancing strategies

prompt_templates.title: Simple Market Buy
prompt_templates.prompt: Buy [amount] USDT of [currency_pair]. Check my balance first.
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic market buy with balance check

prompt_templates.title: Limit Order at Target Price
prompt_templates.prompt: Place a limit buy for [amount] USDT of [currency_pair] at [price].
prompt_templates.scenario: Limit order placement at specific price

prompt_templates.title: Asset Swap
prompt_templates.prompt: Swap all my [source_coin] into [target_coin] if the value is at least 10 USDT.

output_examples.output: Order Draft: BTC_USDT, buy, market, amount=100 USDT, estimated fill at current market price. Slippage may occur in fast markets. Reply 'Confirm order' to place.
Your Gate spot account total value: $12,450.00 USDT equivalent. Holdings: BTC (0.15), ETH (2.5), USDT (500)

best_practices: Always wait for explicit user confirmation before executing any order
Check account balance and minimum order requirements before placing orders
Present order drafts with estimated costs and risk notes
Verify trade fills and report actual execution details
anti_patterns: Assuming user wants market orders when they specify limit prices
Providing trade execution without showing order details first

faq.question: Does this skill support take-profit or stop-loss orders?
faq.answer: No, this skill does not support TP/SL trigger orders. It places standard limit orders only.

faq.question: How does the confirmation process work?
faq.answer: Before any order execution, the skill shows an order draft and waits for explicit confirmation like 'Confirm order'.

faq.question: What minimum order amounts apply?
faq.answer: Most pairs require a minimum of 10 USDT for quote-amount orders. Specific minimums vary by trading pair.

faq.question: Can this skill execute market orders?
faq.answer: Yes, market orders are supported. For market buys, the amount is in USDT; for market sells, the amount is in the base currency.

faq.question: How are price conditions handled?
faq.answer: Price conditions are calculated at order placement time. The skill converts conditions like '2% lower' to a target limit price.

faq.question: Does this skill access my API keys directly?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides guidance for an AI assistant. Actual API key management is handled by the Claude Code tool integration.
